case_title: DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT VS. JACK WELCH INSTITUTE

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK WELCH INSTITUTE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TERRA SYE (SENIOR DIRECTOR OF STUDENT SERVICES & OPERATIONS) VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 -AMENDING NAME OF DEFENDANT FILED BY ROESSLER WEINERT, DIANE [FULL NAME: DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT CRAIG] AS TO DEFENDANT JACK WELCH INSTITUTE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.[HEARING - AUGUST-22-2023 AT 10:00 AM]

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-04-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK WELCH MANAGEMENT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. CONTINUED DATE AS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF FOR 3 MONTHS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROESSLER WEINERT, DIANE [FULL NAME: DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT CRAIG] IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JACK WELCH INSTITUTE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF AND THERFORE SHALL TAKE NOTHING ON HER CLAIM.
